title: Cozy & Calm
description: Ever wanted to take a break from those hardcore, tech-based modpacks? Stay in a cottage and rest a while!
body:
Have you ever wanted a nice, cozy Minecraft experience? Well, here it is! No tech mods, no magic, just cosmetics, your wolf companion, and a nice, cozy cottage to stay in.

## Guide:
When making a world, you should play in peaceful, with keepInventory set to true. When you load into your world, find a cottage and set up your Simple Storage Network underground, using the materials in your backpack. Also, using the Doggy Talents starter kit, you can get your own dog! From this point on, the world is your ~~clam~~ oyster.

## Recommended Specs:
I made this mod on a 16GB RAM computer, but only 6GB was allocated to Minecraft, and it ran well. It shouldn't be too resource intensive, given the lack of a lot of modded stuff going on.

## Fun Mods:
- Blåhaj. It adds a simple Blåhaj plushie which can be changed with a stonecutter.
- Cosmetics. A few cosmetic mods are installed, so you can customise your character.
- Doggy Talents. Gives you a friendly companion, who will fight for and be loyal to you.
- Furniture mods and chisels. These mods give you plenty of decorative choices for your home.
- And a few more!

Cosmetic Armor Reworked is from https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked
